recommendations.title: Ouija House
recommendations.overview: A graduate student, who is trying to finish the last of her research on a book project that she hopes will help her down-on-her-luck mother, brings friends to a house with a dark past, where they soon unwittingly summon an evil entity who makes the h

recommendations.title: The Empty Man
recommendations.overview: On the trail of a missing girl, an ex-cop comes across a secretive group attempting to summon a terrifying supernatural entity.

recommendations.title: Malicious
recommendations.overview: A young college professor and his pregnant wife unwittingly release a malevolent entity with murderous intentions.

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil
recommendations.overview: When Boom suffers abandonment and abuse by Prathan, she decides to use black magic to take revenge on him and his family.

recommendations.title: The Jester
recommendations.overview: A malevolent being known as The Jester terrorizes the inhabitants of a small town on Halloween night, including two estranged sisters who must come together to find a way to defeat this evil entity.

recommendations.title: Anomalisa
recommendations.overview: An inspirational speaker becomes reinvigorated after meeting a lively woman who shakes up his mundane existence.

recommendations.title: Demonic
recommendations.overview: A police officer and a psychologist investigate the deaths of five people who were killed while trying to summon ghosts.

recommendations.title: Maléfique
recommendations.overview: Four prisoners discover a handwritten book of black magic in their cell, and decide to use it to escape.

recommendations.title: A Patch of Blue
recommendations.overview: A blind, uneducated white girl is befriended by a black man, who becomes determined to help her escape her impoverished and abusive home life.

recommendations.title: Get Duked!
recommendations.overview: An anarchic, hip-hop inspired comedy that follows four city boys on a wilderness trek as they try to escape a mysterious huntsman.
